name: ExtensionInventoryReport_InventoryListing
title: R5: An inventory listing section (grouped by any of the attributes) (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `InventoryReport.inventoryListing` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`InventoryReport.inventoryListing` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `InventoryReport.inventoryListing` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `InventoryReport.inventoryListing` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `InventoryReport` is not mapped.
Element `InventoryReport.inventoryListing` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
